title: A Strange Phone Call
content: Late one evening, Olivia received a phone call from an unknown number. At first, she almost ignored it, but curiosity made her answer. The voice on the other side sounded nervous and confused. The caller seemed to believe Olivia was someone else entirely. After several awkward minutes, they both realized a simple mistake had caused the misunderstanding. Surprisingly, the conversation slowly became friendly, and they ended up talking about work, travel, and life in the city. Before hanging up, they laughed about the strange situation. Although the call had started unexpectedly, it became one of the most unusual and memorable conversations Olivia had experienced in a long time.
